selected_shots.summary: Episode heading for chapter 3: Slapping the face of village bully Zhao Ba.
selected_shots.selection_reason: Sets the scene title and is the starting point of the episode.
selected_shots.keyframe_moment: Title card displaying '3. 打脸村霸赵霸' with market background.
i2v_risk_notes: Ensure historical market aesthetic without modern elements

selected_shots.summary: Afternoon market bustle at village entrance; Lin Chen collects copper coins, A Cui packs soap bars, sharing a moment of quiet dependence.
selected_shots.story_function: Establish daily life and character relationship before conflict.
selected_shots.selection_reason: Key setup for protagonists' routine and emotional bond; visual executable with actions and atmosphere.
selected_shots.merge_reason: Adjacent narration units in same location/time, no dialogue, consistent actions and emotions.
selected_shots.keyframe_moment: Lin Chen pocketing coins while A Cui bends to pack soap, sweat on her neck, market dust in air.
i2v_risk_notes: Focus on period-appropriate clothing and market props; avoid overcrowding frame

selected_shots.summary: Horse hooves approach; Zhao Ba and his burly retainers arrive aggressively, eyeing Lin Chen's stall.
selected_shots.selection_reason: Key plot beat introducing conflict; visual entry of group changes scene dynamic.
selected_shots.merge_reason: Sequential narration of arrival, same time/location, no dialogue yet, compatible visuals.
selected_shots.keyframe_moment: Zhao Ba on horseback leading retainers through dust, squinting at stall.
i2v_risk_notes: Depict Zhao Ba as obese and menacing without exaggeration

selected_shots.summary: Zhao Ba demands Lin Chen's salt and soap formula threateningly, reveling in his dominance.
selected_shots.selection_reason: Key dialogue and antagonist motivation; essential for plot.
selected_shots.merge_reason: Follows arrival, same speaker, continuous threat.
selected_shots.keyframe_moment: Zhao Ba pointing aggressively at stall, face sweaty and smug.
selected_shots.dialogue_policy: Active speaker: Zhao Ba; onscreen delivery of threat.
i2v_risk_notes: Single active speaker; retainers in background only

selected_shots.summary: Lin Chen sneers, pulls A Cui behind him protectively, preparing to retort.
selected_shots.selection_reason: Builds tension with action and internal resolve.
selected_shots.merge_reason: Adjacent units, no dialogue, same emotional node.
selected_shots.keyframe_moment: Lin Chen stepping forward, hand on A Cui's waist, cold smile.
i2v_risk_notes: Subtle physical contact; focus on protective gesture

selected_shots.summary: Lin Chen mocks Zhao Ba's intelligence and appearance; crowd gasps in shock.
selected_shots.selection_reason: Key protagonist dialogue and crowd reaction beat.
selected_shots.merge_reason: Continuous dialogue from Lin Chen, followed by immediate reaction; single speaker.
selected_shots.keyframe_moment: Lin Chen facing Zhao Ba, mouth open in retort, onlookers in background reacting.
selected_shots.dialogue_policy: Active speaker: Lin Chen; include crowd murmur visually.
i2v_risk_notes: Ensure Lin Chen as sole active speaker; crowd passive

selected_shots.summary: Enraged, Zhao Ba whips and orders his retainers to attack Lin Chen.
selected_shots.selection_reason: Key antagonist command and action initiation.
selected_shots.merge_reason: Direct sequence, single speaker's order into action.
selected_shots.keyframe_moment: Zhao Ba swinging whip, face red with anger, retainers charging.
selected_shots.dialogue_policy: Active speaker: Zhao Ba; brief order.
i2v_risk_notes: Dynamic motion; retainers as group threat

selected_shots.summary: Lin Chen dodges and fights back fiercely against the retainers using fists and elbows, knocking several down amid dust and blood.
selected_shots.story_function: Core action sequence resolving conflict through combat.
selected_shots.selection_reason: Essential plot beat of hitting the bully; visual executable as montage.
selected_shots.merge_reason: Sequential actions in same fight scene, no dialogue shifts, consistent goal; merged for budget but retains key beats.
selected_shots.keyframe_moment: Lin Chen mid-punch, striking a retainer, dust flying, intense expression.
selected_shots.dialogue_policy: Lin Chen's taunt integrated into action; single active if spoken.
i2v_risk_notes: Montage risks inconsistency; use single keyframe for I2V, imply sequence

selected_shots.summary: A Cui, fearful yet resolute, hands Lin Chen a kitchen knife and warns him; their bond deepens.
selected_shots.story_function: Highlight supporting character's involvement and relationship progression.
selected_shots.selection_reason: Key emotional turn and prop handoff during fight.
selected_shots.merge_reason: Adjacent units, single speaker, emotional continuity.
selected_shots.keyframe_moment: A Cui extending knife to Lin Chen, pale face determined, sunlight on blade.
selected_shots.dialogue_policy: Active speaker: A Cui; soft warning.
i2v_risk_notes: Focus on her expression; Lin Chen receiving passively

selected_shots.summary: Zhao Ba, terrified, backs away and pleads for mercy as retainers flee.
selected_shots.keyframe_moment: Zhao Ba retreating, whip trembling, face pale with fear.
selected_shots.dialogue_policy: Active speaker: Zhao Ba; trembling plea.

selected_shots.summary: Villagers cheer Lin Chen's victory; he reflects warmly on protecting A Cui.
selected_shots.selection_reason: Key crowd reaction and internal emotional beat.
selected_shots.merge_reason: Sequential reaction units, no dialogue shift.
selected_shots.keyframe_moment: Crowd applauding, Lin Chen smiling at A Cui, coin bag in hand.
selected_shots.dialogue_policy: Villagers' cheer as group voiceover or visual.
i2v_risk_notes: Crowd as background; focus on protagonists

selected_shots.summary: After packing up, Lin Chen and A Cui walk home at dusk; she thanks him, he teases protectively, atmosphere turns intimate.
selected_shots.merge_reason: Same location/time progression, alternating but compatible speakers; merged for flow.
selected_shots.keyframe_moment: Lin Chen close to A Cui on path, her wiping his sweat, sunset shadows.
selected_shots.dialogue_policy: Separate speakers but merged; Lin Chen's lines continuous, A Cui's integrated.
i2v_risk_notes: Subtle intimacy; single keyframe avoids multi-speaker issue by focusing on interaction

selected_shots.summary: At night by the fire outside the ruined temple, Lin Chen shares earnings and plans future; A Cui feeds him porridge intimately; later, walking to the yard at dusk, they hear approaching footsteps behind—a hook.
selected_shots.story_function: Episode closure with resolution, future setup, and suspense hook.
selected_shots.selection_reason: Critical ending beats: achievement, bond, determination, and cliffhanger; must retain as per rules.
selected_shots.merge_reason: Sequential evening/night units, same characters, emotional continuity; hook preserved.
selected_shots.keyframe_moment: Lin Chen and A Cui by fire, her feeding him, then shift to walking with footsteps in distance.
i2v_risk_notes: Transition time of day; use single moment at fire for I2V, imply walk/hook
